text: Dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi kyunki bedridden bapu ki seva se itni thakan thi, par asli wajah wo dimaagi bimari ki goliyaan hain jo main sabse chhupa kar rakhti hoon. Divorcee hone ke naate pehle hi 'log kya kahenge' wala darr hai, ab ye sab bataya toh khandaan ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Main bas 'sharir toot raha hai' bol kar chup rehti hoon taaki Mummy ka mujh par bharosa bana rahe.

Main shaadi mein nahi ja saki aur sabne socha ki bacchon ki zimmedari ki thakan hai, par andar se main depression se lad rahi hoon aur ye baat batane se darti hoon. Main apni antidepressants ki strip cupboard ke peeche chhupati hoon taaki mere bacchon ko school mein 'ajeeb' maa ka taana na sunna pade. Parivaar ki shanti aur unki 'izzat' ke liye main apna dard 'thakan' ka naam dekar sabke samne muskurati hoon.

Caregiving burnout ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki main bed se uth nahi paayi, par bacchon ke samne yahi bola ki 'viral bukhar' chadha hai. Main depression word use nahi kar sakti kyunki hamare samaj mein ise pagalpan mana jata hai aur main nahi chahti ki meri wajah se mere bacchon ke rishton par koi aanch aaye. Rishton mein doori na aaye, isiliye main apni prescription phaar kar phenk deti hoon taaki ghar mein kalesh na ho.

Shaadi miss hone par jab Mummy ne poocha toh maine bas 'sar dard' ka natak kiya, kyunki main nahi chahti ki unhe lage ki unki beti dimaagi taur par kamzor ho gayi hai. Economic precarity ke beech agar maine dimaagi bimari ka zikr kiya toh sab kahenge ki nakhre kar rahi hoon ya 'natak' hai. Main apni sacchai daba rahi hoon taaki ghar ki maryada aur bacchon ka wellbeing bana rahe.

Jab saheli ne shaadi ki tasveerein dikhayi toh mera dum ghutne laga, par maine bas 'hospital ka kharcha' aur thakan ka bahana banakar phone rakh diya. Community exclusion ki wajah se main pehle hi akeli hoon, ab dimaagi bimari ki baat karke parivaar ke liye naya tamasha khada nahi karna chahti. Ek adarsh beti aur maa dikhne ke liye main apni antidepressants andhere mein chup-chap kha leti hoon.
